name: The Legend of the Galactic Heroes: Die Neue These
original_name: 銀河英雄伝説 Die Neue These
overview: Caught in a 150-year-long war, interstellar nations reach the pinnacle of strategic combat at the hands of two genius leaders. Reinhard of the Galactic Empire, and Yang of the Free Planets Alliance lead the charge from opposing fronts. Fighting is their destiny, but in this vast universe torn by political intrigue, their greatest enemy may not be each other.

trailers.title: Legend of Galactic Heroes: Die Neue These - Official Preview
